src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/api/Ba.general_idea: Remove unused import for RequestMethod as it is no longer used.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor in favor of implicit constructor injection.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/facade.general_idea: Remove redundant @Autowired annotation from constructor injection to align with Spring Boot 3.x best practices.
Remove unused import for @Autowired annotation after its removal from the constructor.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/I.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Comment out the deprecated 'features' property for embedded MongoDB as it is no longer supported in newer versions.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.after:
# This property is deprecated: Feature support has been removed from Embedded Mongo. A custom MongodConfig bean should be defined instead.
# features: SYNC_DELAY

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Update assertThat import to use Hamcrest's static import instead of JUnit 4's wrapper.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: While JUnit 4's assertThat often delegates to Hamcrest, explicit migration to Hamcrest static imports ensures compatibility and removes dependency on JUnit 4 assertion wrappers which may be removed or deprecated in strict JUnit 5 environments.
